title: Once you have a student visa :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Once you have a student visa
Find out about working on a student visa, and how to check or change the conditions of your visa.
- Working on a student visa You may be allowed to work in New Zealand while you are on a student visa, depending on your course of study. You can check this in your visa conditions.

## Working on a student visa
You may be allowed to work in New Zealand while you are on a student visa, depending on your course of study. You can check this in your visa conditions.
- Unpaid work while studying You can do volunteer work while on a student visa in New Zealand, provided you are not paid or rewarded.

## Unpaid work while studying
You can do volunteer work while on a student visa in New Zealand, provided you are not paid or rewarded.
- Check or change your student visa conditions Student visas come with conditions or rules about studying, working, and travelling. Find out how to check your conditions and apply to change them.

## Check or change your student visa conditions
Student visas come with conditions or rules about studying, working, and travelling. Find out how to check your conditions and apply to change them.
